title: Troubleshooting, Security, Recovery, and Operations Handoff · Spiral Review
summary: Resolve a multi-layer workstation incident and hand off a safe, reproducible operating procedure to another technician. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a complete Linux operations evidence portfolio after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Form competing hypotheses, select discriminating observations, and update confidence without changing multiple layers at once.
Use privilege only for the smallest justified operation while preserving command provenance, environment boundaries, and audit evidence.
Preview scope, snapshot relevant state, define stop conditions, and test rollback before risky filesystem, package, or service changes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# linux-basics cumulative operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic stateful terminal simulator.
# Record hypothesis, command, expected signal, observation, conclusion, and recovery.

steps.title: Hypothesis Ladder · changed case
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Linux incident crosses filesystem, permission, process, service, and network evidence. Preserve a baseline, change one bounded layer, record exit status, and verify rollback on case 6.

Which action demonstrates Hypothesis Ladder without dropping earlier contracts?

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Hypothesis Ladder evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write the review evidence note for Operations Handoff: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review Linux incident crosses filesystem, permission, process, service, and network evidence. Preserve a baseline, change one bounded layer, record exit status, and verify rollback on case 3.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Write an accessible runbook with prerequisites, exact observations, safe actions, expected signals, exceptions, recovery, and ownership.
